name: logstrip
description: Compress noisy CI, build, runtime, scanner, and test logs before Codex diagnoses them. Auto-activates via PreToolUse hook when Codex reads a log file.

interface.shortDescription: Compress logs before Codex diagnoses failures.
interface.longDescription: Use the LogStrip CLI to turn noisy CI, build, runtime, scanner, and test logs into compact diagnostic context before Codex spends tokens on them.
defaultPrompt: Compress this log with LogStrip, then diagnose the failure.
Use LogStrip to prepare the referenced CI log before analysis.
